merged_events.event_description: The United States established diplomatic relations with Mongolia via joint communiqué, but no physical mission was yet opened.

evidence.quote: The United States established diplomatic relations with Mongolia on January 27, 1987, when the United States and Mongolia issued a joint communiqué to that effect.

merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy at Ulaanbaatar was opened, with Steven Mann as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy at Ulaanbaatar was opened on April 17, 1988, with Steven Mann as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact date and status match. RDCR confirms the American Embassy at Ulaanbaatar was opened on April 17, 1988.

missing_from_csv.event_description: The United States established diplomatic relations with Mongolia via joint communiqué on January 27, 1987. No physical mission was opened at this time.
missing_from_csv.notes: High-confidence event from RDCR with verified citation. This represents the formal establishment of diplomatic relations over a year before the Embassy opened. Should be added as a row preceding the Embassy opening, with status 'None' indicating relations established but no mission yet.
